message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  BoxBorderColor #888888
  BoxBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FF
  ActorBorderColor #888888
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FF
}

actor User
participant Frontend

actor "API Gateway" as APIGW

box "Matching Service" #E6E6E6
  participant Controller
  participant Service
end box

box "Matching Database" #E6E6E6
  participant Questions
  participant MatchRequests
end box

User -> Frontend : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
Frontend -> APIGW : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}
APIGW -> Controller : PUT /api/find/match\npayload: {requestId}

Controller -> Service : checkForMatch(requestId)

Service -> MatchRequests : find user's MatchRequest with requestId
MatchRequests --> Service : user's MatchRequest

Service -> MatchRequests : find another MatchRequest
MatchRequests --> Service : another MatchRequest

Service -> Questions : get a random question
Questions --> Service : Question

Service -> Service : create sessionInfo and attach to each MatchRequest

Service -> MatchRequests : update the 2 MatchRequests
MatchRequests --> Service

Service --> Controller : user's MatchRequest

Controller --> APIGW : 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
APIGW --> Frontend : 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}
Frontend --> User : 200 OK\npayload: {user's MatchRequest}

Frontend -> Frontend : switch to session page
@enduml
